Description: A jagged crack splits the cavern floor, pulsing with concentrated spore energy. The air above shimmers with hallucinogenic haze, bending light and sound into unsettling patterns. Across the rift, the path continues — but the gap is wide.

Replies.SsText: You leap over the chasm. Spore-laden air singes your lungs mid-flight, but you land safely on the other side.

Replies.ReplyText: Attempt to seal the rift with magic.
Replies.SsText: Arcane energy knits the rift shut. The spore plume collapses inward, and blessed silence fills the chamber. The path ahead is clear.
Replies.FlText: Your spell destabilizes the rift. Spore energy erupts violently, and twisted forms claw their way out of the crack.

Replies.SsText: You spend coin on a containment vessel and carefully siphon the concentrated spore energy. The harvest yields valuable reagents and hard-won insight.
